generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LX : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoUST10LX_PointCloudData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435i : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IntelDeepsenseD435i_CameraData
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

instance HokuyoUST10LX_PointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LX
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435i_CameraData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435i
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoUST10LX_PointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANModel
]

instance CameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed camera feed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IntelDeepsenseD435i_CameraData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterModel
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed and steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Tracked object data from Kalman filter"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData, CameraData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for LiDAR point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectClusteringEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance ISO15622ACCControlStrategy : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622 standard-based adaptive cruise control strategy"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance ObjectClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for DBSCAN-based point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ObjectTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for Kalman filter-based object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for ISO 15622 ACC control strategy"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for vehicle state and object track storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack5SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration"
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 scripting environment"
]

instance CppCompiler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ compiler for performance-critical components"
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing"
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time UI for vehicle state, object tracks, and driving path"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC system computation to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides ComputationOffloadingInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote control of ACC system, speed setting, and emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCCmdAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of vehicle and environment"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generating human-readable reports of vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:provides ReportInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring data for vehicle state and object tracks"
]

instance ComputationOffloadingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status of ACC system computation offloading"
]

instance EnableACCCmdAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable or disable adaptive cruise control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visual representation of vehicle and surroundings"
]

instance ReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable reports for troubleshooting and operational insights"
]

instance VedderESC : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor voltage conversion"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo for steering angle adjustments"
]

instance TraxxasVehicleSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle based on Traxxas teleoperated platform"
    base:contains JetsonNXComputer, OrinNanoComputer, HokuyoUST10LX, IntelDeepsenseD435i, VedderESC, SteeringServo
]

]

instance OrinNanoComputer : DTDFVocab:Component [

]

instance ISO23247Architecture : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adapted ISO 23247 reference architecture for automotive"
]

instance CaseBasedGeneralization : DTDFVocab:Model [

]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals (desired speed, emergency braking commands) generated by the ACC Controlling FE are converted to motor voltage commands and steering adjustments by the Actuation FE and Steering Servo Actuation FE, respectively."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end latency ≤100 ms (per 3GPP TS 22.185) and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms for event ordering and coordination."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Structured into Physical Twin Entity (sensors/actuators), Digital Twin Entity (ACC, data processing), User Entity (visualization/control), and Cross-System Entity (Data Translation), with data flowing via ROS2 and Wi-Fi."
]

    base:desc "Design phase (development and troubleshooting by developers) and as operated (vehicle operation and monitoring by operators), supporting digital thread for product lifecycle management."
]

    base:desc "ROS2 for intra-component communication, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication, latency ≤100 ms per 3GPP TS 22.185."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "On-board NVIDIA Jetson hardware for real-time processing, cloud for Data Storage."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 for reference architecture, ISO 15622 for ACC control strategy."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety considerations include maintaining end-to-end latency of at most 100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms for real-time safety-critical operations; security measures are not specified in the document."
]
